reasoning: The HIPAA control 164_308_a_3_ii_a focuses on authorization and supervision, which directly maps to Kubernetes RBAC and access control mechanisms. Ensuring that users and service accounts have the least privilege, avoiding cluster-admin bindings, and disabling automatic service account token mounting are key practices to enforce authorization and supervision. Additionally, ensuring that the API server uses RBAC for authorization aligns with this control.
title: 164_308_a_3_ii_a: 164.308(a)(3)(ii)(A) Authorization and/or supervision
